objective: Freeze the design rationale for a future location-boundary specialist module. Consolidate evidence from Stage27-H2F, Stage28-A, Stage28-B v2, and Stage28-C-lite. Do not implement the module.

final_stage27_baseline.notes: product_power=0.90 is the stable Stage27 baseline; no candidate design in Stage28-D changes default behavior

stage27_h2f.interpretation: product remains final; learned/hybrid are diagnostic; missing evidence is controlled; predicate false SUPPORT is small; remaining bottleneck is location/role frame mismatch

stage28_a.interpretation: location is the dominant sub-axis inside location_role; product false SUPPORT is location-heavy

stage28_b_v2.interpretation: Stage28-B v2 fixed the earlier parser issue; paired source_id grouping works; location_swap has enough coverage to support sanity audit and future diagnostic analysis

stage28_c_lite_sanity_audit.interpretation: inspected cases preserve subject, predicate, object, and time; only location changes; NOT_ENTITLED is valid for inspected examples; location_swap is not time_swap-like corruption based on this sanity sample; larger audit may still be future validation, but immediate removal is not justified

location_validity_sanity_audit.conclusion: location_swap is retained as a valid hard frame-boundary diagnostic axis; immediate removal is not justified by available evidence
location_validity_sanity_audit.caveat: Only 20 of 300 location_swap examples were manually inspected; full audit of all 300 records has not been completed

failure_mode_definition.name: location_false_SUPPORT
failure_mode_definition.description: The model produces a SUPPORT decision for a claim where the event location does not match the source document, while subject, predicate, object, and time are preserved
distinguished_from: missing_evidence_failure: source does not mention the relevant fact
predicate_failure: what happened is described differently
role_failure: who performed or received the action is different
time_failure: when the event occurred is different

design_goals: reduce location_swap false SUPPORT at the product axis
preserve missing evidence rejection (missing SUPPORT must remain 0)
preserve predicate rejection (predicate SUPPORT must not increase materially)
avoid increasing false SUPPORT on non-location axes (role, predicate, missing, other)
keep product_power=0.90 behavior unchanged by default
make specialist optional and ablatable via explicit flag
non_goals: no default replacement of product gate
no broad geography or world-knowledge module
no claim that all 300 location_swap examples are clean
no claim that specialist is validated in any training run

candidate_designs.name: location_boundary_decision_cap
candidate_designs.description: Base product entitlement is preserved; an optional location_boundary_prob signal is used only to cap entitlement downward for location-sensitive examples
pros: cannot increase entitlement if implemented as cap
cons: requires reliable location_boundary_prob signal to be constructed

candidate_designs.name: factorized_frame_subheads
candidate_designs.description: frame_prob factorized into subheads: entity_frame, role_frame, location_frame, event_frame, title_frame; frame_prob becomes a product or min of subhead probabilities

candidate_designs.name: residual_learned_location_correction
candidate_designs.description: A learned residual correction applied only for location cases, using the local learned signal observed in H2F
cons: Stage27-H2E showed naive residual can worsen aggregate performance
candidate_designs.status: not preferred unless bounded by cap

candidate_designs.name: dataset_only_split
candidate_designs.description: Partition location_swap into clean_location_swap, ambiguous_location_swap, and invalid_location_swap buckets; no model change
pros: safest option; no model change required
cons: does not reduce false SUPPORT on its own
candidate_designs.status: required supporting step, not final solution

preferred_design.name: location_boundary_decision_cap
preferred_design.final_decision_style: product-style; learned-only gate is not used as primary decision
preferred_design.why_preferred: Stage27-H2F showed learned and hybrid branches have local signal but are unstable; a bounded cap uses the signal directionally (only to reduce over-entitlement) without allowing learned instability to increase false SUPPORT on other axes; the hard cap has a provable safety property
preferred_design.activation_policy: optional flag only; disabled by default; default product_power=0.90 behavior is unchanged
preferred_design.safety_property: the cap cannot increase entitlement above base product entitlement

required_prediction_export.purpose: Enable per-axis overlap analysis and false-SUPPORT attribution before specialist implementation
required_fields: per-axis prediction records (learned and hybrid branches)

evaluation_plan.comparison: Stage27 product_power=0.90 baseline vs Stage28-F location cap model
success_criteria: location_swap SUPPORT count decreases relative to Stage27 baseline
predicate_swap SUPPORT does not increase materially

decision.stage28_f_deliverable: minimal location-boundary specialist candidate (disabled by default)

stage28_e.name: Stage28-E
deliverables: stable example IDs in all exported prediction records
source_id and pair_id linkable to Stage28-B v2 audit buckets
normalized gold and pred labels in export
all product component probabilities exported (frame_prob, predicate_coverage_prob, sufficiency_prob, entitlement_for_decision)
per-axis prediction records for learned and hybrid branches

stage28_f.name: Stage28-F
deliverables: optional location_boundary_head or location_frame_head (disabled by default flag)
trained and evaluated on controlled diagnostic setting only
compared against frozen Stage27 product_power=0.90 baseline

limitations: only 20 examples were sanity-audited manually in Stage28-C-lite
controlled no-time setting only; no OOD evidence
location-boundary labels may need explicit construction
location_boundary_prob signal does not yet exist as a model output
role_swap false SUPPORT (6 cases) is not addressed by the location-boundary specialist
conclusion: Stage28-D retains location_swap as a valid hard frame-boundary diagnostic axis and recommends a bounded location-boundary decision cap as the safest next specialist design, while preserving product_power=0.90 as the frozen Stage27 baseline.
